title: Placeholder Pack
description: Technologic tomfoolery with Create, Mekanism, Ad Astra, and AE2. Defend your creations with Scorched Guns, and explore the world with Valkryien Skies and Clockwork.
body:
_**A minimum of eight gigabytes of memory is recommanded for the best experience.**_

## Placeholder Pack
The Placeholder Pack is aimed towards those that enjoy a sandbox experience,
without any quests, and where you choose your own goals, wether you wish to
build a mega-factory that manufactures every ingot in-game, or build a simple
farm in the Plains.

## Why the name?
The name is just a placeholder until I think of something better.
